product: Regional model hosting for Genie Spaces in Japan and Korea
tagline: For workspaces in ap northeast 1 (Tokyo) and ap northeast 2 (Seoul), Genie Spaces now use models hosted in the same region.
what_it_does: For workspaces in ap northeast 1 (Tokyo) and ap northeast 2 (Seoul), Genie Spaces now use models hosted in the same region. Users in these regions no longer require cross Geo processing to use Genie Spaces. This article describes Databricks Designated Services, which are features in Databricks that use Databricks Geos to manage data residency when processing customer content.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: For workspaces in ap northeast 1 (Tokyo) and ap northeast 2 (Seoul), Genie Spaces now use models hosted in the same region.
